footer.v: 1 - Còn sử dụng, 0 - Không còn sử dụng

command.text: declare @$exists nvarchar(512), @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512), @$updateConflict nvarchar(512), @$deleteConflict nvarchar(512) select @$exists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Kiểu duyệt %s đã có trong danh mục kiểu duyệt.' else N'The approval category %s already exists.' end select @$updateConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Kiểu duyệt %s đã phát sinh, không thể sửa được.' else N'Cannot edit the approval category %s. It has already been used.' end select @$deleteConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Kiểu duyệt %s đã phát sinh, không thể xóa được.' else N'Cannot delete the approval category %s. It has already been used.' end select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Kiểu duyệt %s đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'The approval category %s has been modified or deleted by another user.' end

if exists(select 1 from @@table where loai_duyet = @loai_duyet and ma_kieu = @ma_kieu) begin select 'ma_kieu' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', rtrim(@ma_kieu)) as message return end select @datetime0 = getdate(), @datetime2 = getdate(), @user_id0 = @@userID, @user_id2 = @@userID

if not exists(select 1 from @@table where loai_duyet = $loai_duyet.OldValue and ma_kieu = $ma_kieu.OldValue) begin select 'ma_kieu' as field, replace(@$recordHasBeenChanged, '%s', rtrim($ma_kieu.OldValue)) as message return end
if @ma_kieu <> $ma_kieu.OldValue begin if exists(select 1 from @@table where loai_duyet = @loai_duyet and ma_kieu = @ma_kieu and not(loai_duyet = $loai_duyet.OldValue and ma_kieu = $ma_kieu.OldValue)) begin select 'ma_kieu' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', rtrim(@ma_kieu)) as message return end if exists(select 1 from soctkieuduyet where loai_duyet = $loai_duyet.OldValue and ma_kieu = $ma_kieu.OldValue) begin select 'ma_kieu' as field, replace(@$updateConflict, '%s', rtrim($ma_kieu.OldValue)) as message return end end else begin declare @$dvcs char(1), @$ma_bp char(1), @$nh_kh1 char(1), @$nh_kh2 char(1), @$nh_kh3 char(1), @$tk char(1), @$so_luong char(1), @$tien char(1), @$ma_nt char(1), @$loai_ct char(1) select @$dvcs = dvcs, @$ma_bp = ma_bp, @$nh_kh1 = nh_kh1, @$nh_kh2 = nh_kh2, @$nh_kh3 = nh_kh3, @$tk = tk, @$so_luong = so_luong, @$tien = tien, @$ma_nt = ma_nt, @$loai_ct = loai_ct from @@table where loai_duyet = @loai_duyet and ma_kieu = @ma_kieu if exists(select 1 from @@table where loai_duyet = @loai_duyet and ma_kieu in (select ma_kieu from soctkieuduyet where loai_duyet = @loai_duyet and ma_kieu = @ma_kieu) and (@$dvcs <> @dvcs or @$ma_bp <> @ma_bp or @$nh_kh1 <> @nh_kh1 or @$nh_kh2 <> @nh_kh2 or @$nh_kh3 <> @nh_kh3 or @$tk <> @tk or @$so_luong <> @so_luong or @$tien <> @tien or @$ma_nt <> @ma_nt or @$loai_ct <> @loai_ct)) begin select case when @$dvcs <> @dvcs then 'dvcs' when @$ma_bp <> @ma_bp then 'ma_bp' when @$nh_kh1 <> @nh_kh1 then 'nh_kh1' when @$nh_kh2 <> @nh_kh2 then 'nh_kh2' when @$nh_kh3 <> @nh_kh3 then 'nh_kh3' when @$tk <> @tk then 'tk' when @$so_luong <> @so_luong then 'so_luong' when @$tien <> @tien then 'tien' when @$ma_nt <> @ma_nt then 'ma_nt' when @$loai_ct <> @loai_ct then 'loai_ct' else 'ma_kieu' end as field, replace(@$updateConflict, '%s', rtrim(@ma_kieu)) as message return end end
update @@table set datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where loai_duyet = @loai_duyet and ma_kieu = @ma_kieu
if exists(select 1 from soctkieuduyet where loai_duyet = @loai_duyet and ma_kieu = @ma_kieu) begin select replace(@$deleteConflict, '%s', rtrim(@ma_kieu)) as message return end
